version_description: Please note: this song is played with a Capo on the first fret using the chords below to sound like the recorded album version. The progression is played throughout the entire song. I occasionally change the strum pattern between the two shown to add variation/maintain interest.

versions.version_description: All chord voicings included are as heard on the original recording.

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.version_description: It's just capo on 3 and Em C B7 the whole way through.

content:
[Intro]
N.C. x4
[ch]D[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
[ch]D[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                         [ch]A[/ch]
   A lonely mother gazing out of her window[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]                            [ch]G[/ch]
Staring at a son that she just can't touch[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]D[/ch]                             [ch]A[/ch]
If at any time he's in a jam, she'll be by his side[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]C[/ch]                       [ch]G[/ch]
But he doesn't realize he hurts her so much[/tab]

[tab][ch]D[/ch]                                 [ch]A[/ch]
   But all the praying just ain't helping at all[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]C[/ch]                            [ch]G[/ch]
'cause he can't seem to keep his self out of trouble[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]D[/ch]                               [ch]A[/ch]
So he goes out and he makes his money the best way he knows how[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C[/ch]                       [ch]G[/ch]
Another body laying cold in the gutter, listen to me[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                [ch]A[/ch]
Don't go chasing waterfalls[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]C[/ch]                                [ch]G[/ch]
Please stick to the rivers and the lakes that you're used to[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]D[/ch]                         [ch]A[/ch]
I know that you're gonna have it your way or nothing at all[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]
But I think you're moving too fast[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                       [ch]A[/ch]
  Little precious has a natural obsession[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C[/ch]                        [ch]G[/ch]
For temptation but he just can't see[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                               [ch]A[/ch]
  She gives him loving that his body can't handle[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]                        [ch]G[/ch]
But all he can say is "baby it's good to me"[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                             [ch]A[/ch]
  One day he goes and takes a glimpse in the mirror[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]C[/ch]                         [ch]G[/ch]
But he doesn't recognize his own face[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                             [ch]A[/ch]
  His health is fading and he doesn't know why[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C[/ch]                     [ch]G[/ch]
3 letters took him to his final resting place, y'all don't hear me?[/tab]
 
[Chorus]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                [ch]A[/ch]
Don't go chasing waterfalls[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]C[/ch]                                [ch]G[/ch]
Please stick to the rivers and the lakes that you're used to[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]D[/ch]                         [ch]A[/ch]
I know that you're gonna have it your way or nothing at all[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]
But I think you're moving too fast[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                [ch]A[/ch]
Don't go chasing waterfalls[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]C[/ch]                                [ch]G[/ch]
Please stick to the rivers and the lakes that you're used to[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]D[/ch]                         [ch]A[/ch]
I know that you're gonna have it your way or nothing at all[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]
But I think you're moving too fast    c'mon[/tab]

[Verse 3]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                                           [ch]A[/ch]
  I seen a rainbow yesterday, but too many storms have come and gone[/tab]
[tab]                                     [ch]C[/ch]
Leavin' a trace of not one God-given ray, is it because my life is ten shades of gray?[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]G[/ch]
I pray all ten fade away Seldom praise Him for the sunny days[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                                                   [ch]A[/ch]
  And like His promise is true only my faith can undo[/tab]
[tab]                                               [ch]C[/ch]
The many chances I blew, to bring my life to anew[/tab]
[tab]                                                   [ch]G[/ch]                   N.C.
Clear blue and unconditional skies, have dried the tears from my eyes, no more lonely cries[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]D[/ch]
My only bleedin' hope, is for the folk who can't cope[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]A[/ch]
With such an endurin' pain that it keeps 'em in the pourin' rain[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
  Who's to blame for tootin' 'caine into your own vein?[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
  What a shame you shoot and aim for someone else's brain[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]D[/ch]
You claim the insane and name this day in time for fallin' prey[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]A[/ch]
to crime I say the system got you victim to your own mind[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
  Dreams are hopeless aspirations[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]G[/ch]
In hopes of comin' true believe in yourself the rest is up to me and you[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                [ch]A[/ch]
Don't go chasing waterfalls[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]C[/ch]                                [ch]G[/ch]
Please stick to the rivers and the lakes that you're used to[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]D[/ch]                         [ch]A[/ch]
I know that you're gonna have it your way or nothing at all[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]
But I think you're moving too fast[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                [ch]A[/ch]
Don't go chasing waterfalls[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]C[/ch]                                [ch]G[/ch]
Please stick to the rivers and the lakes that you're used to[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]D[/ch]                         [ch]A[/ch]
I know that you're gonna have it your way or nothing at all[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]
But I think you're moving too fast[/tab]
(fade out)
